summary: Completed testing of Photo Editor feature in Seller Dashboard (Iteration 38). All 28 backend API tests pass. Frontend Photo Editor modal is fully functional with upload, AI background removal, adjustments, and background customization features. Fixed 2 backend bugs: upload and finalize endpoints were not accepting JSON body correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/photo-editor/backgrounds returns 200 with all categories (solid, gradient, pattern, texture)
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/upload accepts base64 images and returns photo IDs
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/upload validates empty photos (returns 400)
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/upload supports multiple photos
Backend: GET /api/photo-editor/photos returns user's edited photos list
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/remove-background removes background using rembg AI
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/remove-background returns processing_time_ms and has_transparency
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/adjust applies brightness/contrast/saturation/sharpness
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/apply-background applies solid color backgrounds
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/apply-background applies gradient backgrounds
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/apply-background applies pattern backgrounds
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/reset/{photo_id} resets photo to original
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/undo/{photo_id} undoes last edit
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/save-preference saves background preference
Backend: GET /api/photo-editor/preference returns saved preference
Backend: DELETE /api/photo-editor/photos/{photo_id} deletes photo
Backend: POST /api/photo-editor/finalize prepares photos for listing
Backend: All endpoints require authentication (return 401 without token)
Frontend: Photo Editor tab visible in Seller Dashboard
Frontend: Photo Editor tab shows feature cards (Multi Upload, AI Background, Custom BG, Enhance)
Frontend: 'Open Photo Editor' button opens modal
Frontend: Photo Editor Modal shows photo thumbnails in left sidebar
Frontend: Photo Editor Modal has Edit and Background tabs
Frontend: Edit tab shows AI Background Removal button
Frontend: Edit tab shows adjustment sliders (Brightness, Contrast, Saturation, Sharpness)
Frontend: Edit tab shows Apply Adjustments, Undo, Reset buttons
Frontend: Background tab shows 'Remove background first' message when background not removed
Frontend: Modal footer shows 'Use X Photos for Listing' button
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: /api/photo-editor/upload endpoint was using query parameter instead of request body - added PhotoUploadRequest model
Fixed: /api/photo-editor/finalize endpoint was using query parameter instead of request body - added FinalizePhotosRequest model
rembg library is installed and working for AI background removal
All background presets (solid colors, gradients, patterns) are properly defined in BACKGROUND_PATTERNS
seed_data_creation: Test photos created during pytest execution are stored in edited_photos collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo Editor feature fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: /api/photo-editor/backgrounds (public), /api/photo-editor/upload, /api/photo-editor/remove-background, /api/photo-editor/adjust, /api/photo-editor/apply-background, /api/photo-editor/reset/{photo_id}, /api/photo-editor/undo/{photo_id}, /api/photo-editor/save-preference, /api/photo-editor/preference, /api/photo-editor/photos/{photo_id} (DELETE), /api/photo-editor/finalize. All require auth except /backgrounds. Frontend modal accessible via Seller Dashboard > Photo Editor tab > Open Photo Editor button.
